scope_in: (a) 删 analysisResultJson 字段的 insertable=false, updatable=false (T01 punt)
(b) 加 @JdbcTypeCode(SqlTypes.JSON) 注解 (import org.hibernate.annotations.JdbcTypeCode + org.hibernate.type.SqlTypes · 沿 ai-analysis-service AnalysisResult.steps pattern)
(c) 字段类型保持 String (PG JSONB → JVM String 是最简单映射 · 不引入 Map 复杂度)
(a) constructor: GuestSessionRepository + RestTemplate (@Qualifier 'aiAnalysisRestTemplate' · T06 已注入) + AiAnalysisProperties (T06 已建)
- try { resp = restTemplate.getForEntity(url, Map.class) · resp.statusCode 200 ? proceed : AI_SERVICE_FAILURE } catch RestClientException → AI_SERVICE_FAILURE
'RESULT_READY' → outcome=READY · g.status=2 · g.analysisResultJson = objectMapper.writeValueAsString(body) (JSON 化全 body 存盘 · P0 简单 · T08 claim 时再解析具体字段)
'NOT_FOUND' → outcome=NOT_FOUND_UPSTREAM (上游 task_id 找不到 · 应触发降级)
- 返 ResultOutcome with body 中提取的 subject/stemLength/chatModel/ocrModel + upstreamStatus
(c) ResultOutcome.Kind enum: SESSION_NOT_FOUND / ANALYZING / READY / FAILED / NOT_FOUND_UPSTREAM / AI_SERVICE_FAILURE
(d) ResultOutcome 字段: Kind kind · String subject · Integer stemLength · String chatModel · String ocrModel
(b) Result result (nested · nullable · 仅 READY 时填)

(d) nested record Result(@JsonProperty('subject') String subject · @JsonProperty('stem_length') Integer stemLength · @JsonProperty('chat_model') String chatModel · @JsonProperty('ocr_model') String ocrModel)
NOT_FOUND_UPSTREAM → 404 (上游 task_id 不存在 · 罕见竞态)
5. backend/anonymous-service/src/test/java/com/longfeng/anonymousservice/SC12T07AnonResultE2EIT.java 新建 IT (沿 IntegrationTestBase · 6-7 testcase · NO MOCK · 真转发):

(a) result_when_task_not_started_returns_404_or_analyzing → mint session (不 analyze) · GET /api/anon/result/{id} header X-Anon-Token → 上游可能返 'NOT_FOUND' 或返 task 行 status 'ANALYZING' (取决于 T06 是否预创建任务) · 验响应映射正确
(b) result_after_analyze_returns_analyzing_status → mint+consent+questions+analyze (T06 链全调) · 立即 GET /api/anon/result · 验 status='ANALYZING' (因 AI 真在跑 · 太快返 READY 概率低 · 但允许)

(c) result_end_to_end_waits_for_ready_when_qianwen_succeeds → mint+consent+questions+analyze · 用 Awaitility 或 sleep loop 等 g.status=2 (≤ 30s · Qianwen 真返 · 但用 small image 减少时延) · GET /api/anon/result · 验 status='READY' + result.subject 等字段非空 · DB g.analysisResultJson 非空 (JSONB fix 验证)
(e) result_with_foreign_anonQid_returns_403 → mint A · GET /api/anon/result/{B.id} header X-Anon-Token=A.token → 403 ANON_SESSION_MISMATCH
(f) result_when_session_not_exists_returns_404 → mint session 后手动 SQL 删 guest_session row · GET → 404

(g) result_when_ai_service_down_returns_502 → 同 T06 case e pattern · @DynamicPropertySource override anon.ai-analysis.base-url=http://localhost:65535 (closed port) · GET /api/anon/result → 502 + code='AI_SERVICE_FAILURE'
6. (可选) backend/anonymous-service/src/test/java/com/longfeng/anonymousservice/SC12T07JsonbWriteE2EIT.java 新建 (或合并到 SC12T07AnonResultE2EIT):
(a) jsonb_write_succeeds_after_fix → 直接 repo.save 一个含 analysisResultJson='{"foo":"bar"}' 的 GuestSession 行 · 不再因为 JSONB bind 错 SQLState 42804 · DB 查回字段=JSON 字符串
(b) (T01 留的 bug 在这里关闭 · IT 严格守住)

8. Regression 不破 · 既有 70 IT 全绿 (T06 后) · SC-13/SC-13-SHARER/SC-00/SC-11/SC-12-T01-T06)
